nodes.label: AI as advisory tool for feasibility and suggestions
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous executor of work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't involve AI in actually building any process and simply ask for suggestions

nodes.label: AI as learning aid for unfamiliar domains
nodes.grounding_span: I asked AI to provide me with the code and copy pasted it. I also asked it to provide a fully commented code which helped me understand each line

nodes.label: AI thoroughness and domain knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: AI did provide a detailed feasibility analysis and technical initiation document, it also suggested that SNOW has a framework called 'Predictive Intelligence'

nodes.label: AI as enabler of human paradigm shift
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human work
nodes.grounding_span: the work we do today will mostly be replaced by AI but it does not imply that we won't have any more work to do but it will just elevate the tables

nodes.label: Data security and client confidentiality
nodes.grounding_span: since it involves client data, I do it completely myself

nodes.label: Human intellectual growth and skill evolution
nodes.grounding_span: humanity can work towards changing the age from bronze to 'industrial'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI's insightful suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: This really changed my perspective about using AI as they are thorough on knowledge and can provide amazing suggestions

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's generic troubleshooting
nodes.grounding_span: AI sometimes provides generic suggestions in niche areas

nodes.label: Optimistic view of AI elevating human work
nodes.grounding_span: it will just elevate the tables

nodes.label: Context-rich abstraction before AI interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I provide the AI with a lot of context after abstracting away any PII or client centric details

nodes.label: Hands-on verification and independent troubleshooting
nodes.grounding_span: after I analyzed it myself, the real reason turned out to be that the credential file had a lot of earlier credentials merged into it which I manually deleted
